sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁלּיט

Transliteration: shallı̂yṭ

Phonetic: shal-leet'

BDB Definition:

  1. having mastery, having authority, ruling
    1. having or exercising mastery, ruling
    2. ruler (substantive)
    3. having authority
      1. it is authorised

Origin: corresponding to H7989

TWOT entry: 3034b

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
